title: plectronia lucida
intro: Plectronia lucida is a plant species in the Rubiaceae family, commonly known as the clear-eyed plectronia or clear eye plectronia, characterized by its bright yellow flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Plectronia lucida include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. In some regions, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea or infusions, and in other cultures, it is used in traditional medicine as a poultice or applied topically to affected areas.
